name: bonelab
description: Workaround for Bonelab on the Oculus store

blocks.text: After the OpenXR merge in Bonelab Patch 3, the Oculus build may not work as expected on non‑Oculus OpenXR runtimes; the Steam build was fixed in Patch 6 but the Oculus version hasn’t yet, so as a temporary workaround please use the community “HandsStuck” mod: <https://thunderstore.io/c/bonelab/p/HAHOOS/HandsStuck/.>
